CVE-2020-14929.title: Alpine before 2.23 silently proceeds to use an insecure connectio ...
CVE-2020-14929.summary: Alpine before 2.23 silently proceeds to use an insecure connection after a /tls is sent in certain circumstances involving PREAUTH, which is a less secure behavior than the alternative of closing the connection and letting the user decide what they would like to do.

CVE-2021-38370.summary: In Alpine before 2.25, untagged responses from an IMAP server are accepted before STARTTLS.

CVE-2021-46853.summary: Alpine before 2.25 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) when LIST or LSUB is sent before STARTTLS.
